info.name: OpenCart – Frontend / Browser Endpoints
info.description:
All HTTP routes the OpenCart storefront uses — page renders, AJAX cart updates, checkout steps, account management.

**Base URL:** https://demo.opencart.com

**Tip:** Run the Login request first and enable 'Automatically follow redirects' in Postman settings.

**Environment variables:**
- `baseUrl` = https://demo.opencart.com
- `cart_key` = set manually after Add to Cart
- `order_id`  = set after Confirm Order
